contentList.content: A legendary staff imbued with the essence of the Weave itself. Grants Chromatic Attunement, Arcane Enchantment, Arcane Battery, Spell Slot Restoration, Pearlescent Restoration, Mystra's Grace, Weave's Reclamation, Echoes of Netheril, and unlimited Shield and Counterspell reactions.
A chest containing powerful gear for level 13+ characters.
Cast Shield as a bonus action without expending spell slots.
Cast Counterspell as a bonus action without expending spell slots.
A silver longsword blessed by Tyr, the God of Justice. Grants Wrathful Smite, Soulbreaker, and unlimited Blinding Smite.
This weapon is infused with divine radiance, dealing extra radiant damage on melee attacks.
Legendary boots that combine the power of storms with shadowstep magic. Grants Misty Step, applies Reverberation when inflicting conditions, and provides immunity to web and terrain effects.

A longsword blessed by Selûne, the Moonmaiden. Grants Wrathful Smite, Blinding Smite (unlimited), Light (unlimited), Shield of Faith, Celestial Haste (free action), Spirit Guardians (free action), Plane Shifter Slayer, Radiant Weapon (+1d4 radiant), Critical Bonus (crit on 19-20, reroll damage ≤2), Lathander's Light aura, and Moonshield Aura (Shadow Curse protection).
Call forth spirits to protect you. Nearby enemies take 3d8 Radiant or Necrotic damage. Free action casting.
Radiant spirits surround you. Free action casting.
Necrotic spirits surround you. Free action casting.
Emanates a protective aura that shields allies from the Shadow Curse.
Channel Selûne's radiance to blind your foes. Unlimited uses.

A ring crackling with arcane force. Grants powerful spectral magic including Misty Step, Magic Missile, Shield, Hold Person, Knock, Globe of Invulnerability, Artistry of War, Invisibility, Arcane Gate, and Telekinesis.
Unlimited Level 3 Magic Missile as a bonus action.
Artistry of War. Once per short rest.
Unlimited Hold Person as a bonus action.
Unlimited Knock as a bonus action.
Globe of Invulnerability. Recharges on short rest.
Arcane Gate. Recharges on short rest.

A legendary greatsword once wielded by Orpheus, Prince of the Comet. Infused with psionic power, it grants psychic damage and resistance to psionic attacks, along with Pommel Strike, Slash, Cleave, and Mindcrush weapon actions.
A massive maul infused with divine radiance. Its strikes are blessed with holy power, dealing additional radiant damage to all foes.

A legendary mace blessed by Selune, goddess of the moon. Grants Healing Incense Aura, Lathander's Light (blinds Fiends and Undead), and Moonshield Aura (protects allies from the Shadow Curse). The weapon emits a soft, protective glow.
A legendary longsword forged for those who strike from the shadows. Grants advantage on attacks in darkness, critical hits on 19-20, and rerolls low damage dice.
Half plate armor blessed by Tyr, the God of Justice. Grants +2 to all saving throws, allows full Dexterity bonus to AC, unlimited Celestial Haste, unlimited Misty Step, and Spirit Guardians.
Legendary studded leather armor that bends light around the wearer. Attackers have disadvantage against you until you take damage, refreshing each turn.

Splint armor blessed by Selûne, the Moonmaiden. Grants +5 AC, +2 to all saving throws, allows full Dexterity bonus to AC, unlimited Celestial Haste, unlimited Misty Step, Spirit Guardians, and regenerates 1d4 HP per turn in combat.
Call forth spirits to protect you. Nearby enemies take 3d8 Radiant or Necrotic damage.

A helmet blessed by Tyr, the God of Justice. Grants Balduran's Vitality, Balduran's Protection, Stun/Fear/Blind Immunity, Critical Hit Immunity, HP Regeneration, Darkvision, and the spells Speak with Dead, Speak with Animals, See Invisibility, Protection From Evil And Good, and Faerie Fire.

A circlet blessed by Tyr, the God of Justice. Grants Balduran's Vitality, Balduran's Protection, Stun/Fear/Blind Immunity, Critical Hit Immunity, HP Regeneration, Darkvision, and the spells Speak with Dead, Speak with Animals, See Invisibility, Protection From Evil And Good, and Faerie Fire.

A circlet worn by archmages of old. Grants Fear/Blind Immunity, Darkvision, Reverberation when dealing Thunder damage, and the spells Speak with Dead, Speak with Animals, See Invisibility, Protection From Evil And Good, and Faerie Fire.

A helmet blessed by Selûne, the Moonmaiden. Grants Balduran's Vitality, Balduran's Protection, Stun/Fear/Blind Immunity, Critical Hit Immunity, HP Regeneration, Darkvision, Smite the Graceless, and the spells Speak with Dead, Speak with Animals, See Invisibility, Protection From Evil And Good, and Faerie Fire.

A circlet blessed by Selûne, the Moonmaiden. Grants Balduran's Vitality, Balduran's Protection, Stun/Fear/Blind Immunity, Critical Hit Immunity, HP Regeneration, Darkvision, and the spells Speak with Dead, Speak with Animals, See Invisibility, Protection From Evil And Good, and Faerie Fire.
Gloves blessed by Tyr, the God of Justice. Inflicts Radiating Orb when dealing Radiant damage and grants Tyr's Thunder (Thunderwave).
Gloves blessed by Selûne, the Moonmaiden. Inflicts Radiating Orb when dealing Radiant damage and grants Moonguard Thunder (Thunderwave).
Release a wave of thunderous force. Recharges on short rest.
A cloak blessed by Tyr, the God of Justice. Grants Crusader's Mantle and sets Strength to 29, Constitution to 23, and Dexterity to 23.
A cloak woven from shadows. Grants unlimited Invisibility.
A cloak blessed by Selûne, the Moonmaiden. Grants Crusader's Mantle and sets Strength to 29, Constitution to 23, and Dexterity to 23.

A shield blessed by Tyr, the God of Justice. Grants Reflective Shell, Warding Bond, unlimited Shield reaction, Shield Bash Riposte, and Spellguard (advantage on spell saves and resistance to spell damage).

A shield blessed by Selûne, the Moonmaiden. Grants +5 AC, Reflective Shell, Warding Bond, unlimited Shield reaction, Shield Bash Riposte, and Spellguard (advantage on spell saves and resistance to spell damage).
Unlimited Crusader's Mantle. Costs 1 action point.
